JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, REPORTER BELDON YEE. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF MAY-20-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAY-20-2002 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 611, DIANE WICK. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFT., SENT FOR PROVE-UP.

JUDGE DIANE WICK, CLERK-BETH WILBER, REPORTER-BRENDA FIELDS: C/C FOR COURT TRIAL; NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT, CASE PROCEEDS AS A PROVE-UP WITHOUT DEFENDANT; COURT RULES FOR PLAINTIFF; PLAINTIFF SUBMITS JUDGMENT FORM; REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAY-20-2002 IN DEPT. 611 -

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTRIERI, EUGENE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 640 EDDY ST., #308 $1,071.18 RENT, $99.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,170.18, PER DIEM HOLD OVER OF $21.42; SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
